category_sources: Official Tweak page describes it as an efficient hex editor.
source_facts.description says it is a command-line, ncurses-library-based hex editor.
display_name_sources: Official project page title is Tweak: an efficient hex editor.
docs_sources: Official online man page provides command documentation.
Official project page links the online man page and release source tarball.
repo_sources: Official Tweak page gives the development source command: git clone https://git.tartarus.org/simon/tweak.git.
tags_sources: Official project page and man page document Tweak as a terminal hex editor.
source_facts.description identifies command-line ncurses hex editor.
